title: MANGA NGE Is volume 9 in stores yet
display_title: MANGA NGE Is volume 9 in stores yet
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Is volume 9 in stores yet?             Quote Post by Otaprince » Mon Nov 01, 2004 1:09 am was supposed to come out in October-- anyone got their copy yet?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Nov 01, 2004 5:00 pm Isent in any stores here yet (Phonix, AZ)

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 02, 2004 12:36 am Looks like November 10th. We still have a week to go. http://www.rightstuf.com/cgi-bin/catalogmgr/J6Mhjiq2WR1Afpo59h/browse/item/64158/4/0/0

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 02, 2004 3:26 pm :evil: They just like makeing us wait dont they !! :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 02, 2004 9:17 pm Dark FireStar wrote: :evil: They just like makeing us wait dont they !! :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Nov 03, 2004 7:02 am will it be online available soon too?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Nov 03, 2004 2:59 pm Still 6 months! If I was on a deserted and had to wait 6 months with a volley ball named wilson id go crazy!!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Nov 03, 2004 3:04 pm DFS read again this carefully.. The Eva Monkey wrote: Dude. They're releasing this one six months after the last one. There's been a year's wait between the last several volumes. We're getting it six months earlier than expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Nov 03, 2004 3:07 pm Okay then ill just be pashint or what-ever(eye twitchs).

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 03, 2004 7:37 pm Dark FireStar wrote: Okay then ill just be pashint or what-ever(eye twitchs).

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Mon Nov 15, 2004 8:24 pm anyone have it in their hands YET? it's november 15th, and so far it hasn't shown up in either my local comic book store or bookstore.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 16, 2004 3:23 pm Not here yet either :evil: .......... basterds! lol

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Nov 16, 2004 6:18 pm According to Carl Horn, the November 10th date is the direct buisness shipping date, meaning comic shop vendors and some online retailers were stocked, while most other book stores like borders will be stocked a week afterwards, so it should be available in a couple days or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 16, 2004 6:59 pm :evil: damn it

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Nov 17, 2004 4:23 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: According to Carl Horn, the November 10th date is the direct buisness shipping date, meaning comic shop vendors and some online retailers were stocked, while most other book stores like borders will be stocked a week afterwards, so it should be available in a couple days or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Wed Nov 17, 2004 5:39 pm Oh, well, it will be a while before I can get all of the manga anyways, since I have so much other stuff to buy and can only buy about one volume of the Eva manga every once in a while. Currently I only have the first volume. I'm in about as much of a hurry to buy all of this manga as Sadamoto is to finish it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Nov 17, 2004 9:28 pm Gilgamesh wrote: I'm in about as much of a hurry to buy all of this manga as Sadamoto is to finish it.

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Wed Nov 17, 2004 9:58 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Gilgamesh wrote: I'm in about as much of a hurry to buy all of this manga as Sadamoto is to finish it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 18, 2004 9:26 pm I got something in the mail today. It came with a little something extra.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Fri Nov 19, 2004 12:32 am You must have got an advanced copy. I can't find it anywhere! :evil:
